data.title: In HelloNation, Rehabilitation Expert Kelly Schneider of Evansville, IN, Highlights Accessibility Evaluations
data.description: In Evansville, Indiana on April 22, 2026, a piece released describes the significance of a home accessibility evaluation for ensuring safety and independence. The article, by HelloNation, showcases insights from Rehabilitation Expert Kelly Schneider at Easterseals Rehabilitation Center. Discovering the necessity and advantages of such an evaluation is crucial for individuals seeking to maintain autonomy within their living spaces.

data.title: Oxford Square Capital Corp. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call for April 29, 2026
data.description: Oxford Square Capital Corp. (NasdaqGS: OXSQ) has scheduled a conference call to review their first quarter 2026 earnings on April 29, 2026, at 9:00 AM ET. Investors can join the call by dialing 1-800-715-9871 and entering access code 2511724. A recorded replay of the call will be accessible for 30 days, and those interested can listen by dialing 1-800-770-2030 with the pass-code 2511724#.

data.title: In HelloNation, Dental Expert Dr. Norman D. Knowles of Vero Beach, FL, Highlights Safe Sedation Options for Implant Surgery
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida on April 22, 2026, a PRNewswire report discusses the common delay among patients in seeking dental implants despite recognizing the potential benefits for their health and confidence. Dr. Norman D. Knowles from Art of Smiles in Vero Beach attributes this hesitation to anxiety, as stated in a HelloNation article. This issue points to a larger trend in the field of dentistry regarding patient reluctance towards dental implant procedures even though they can significantly enhance overall well-being.

data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Expert Lance Kammes of Wheaton, IL Discusses Practical Tips for Buying a Home
data.description: In Wheaton, IL, a competitive real estate market poses challenges for homebuyers. Real estate expert Lance Kammes from The Lance Kammes Team underscores the importance of understanding key factors before purchasing property in the area. With property prices averaging $400,000 and demand outnumbering supply, buyers need to act swiftly. Kammes advises buyers to be prepared for bidding wars, thorough inspections, and potential delays in closing deals. This highlights the need for informed decision-making and strategic planning when navigating Wheaton's real estate landscape.

data.title: TransUnion Applauds FHFA, HUD for Advancing VantageScore in Mortgage Lending
data.description: The company affirms its dedication to facilitating a seamless transition to enhance accessibility to cost-effective homeownership.

data.title: City of Vacaville Celebrates Successful Completion of Sustainable Energy Project with OPTERRA Energy Services
data.description: Vacaville, California has successfully finished its Sustainable Energy Project in cooperation with OPTERRA Energy Services, overseen by the city officials. This initiative was made possible through a tax-exempt lease purchase agreement, eliminating the need for upfront capital investment from the City. The project's costs will be covered entirely by anticipated energy savings in the future. Additionally, the project capitalized on $5.4 million in federal funding through the Inflation Reduction Act.

data.title: Hammond Power Solutions Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call and Webcast Notification
data.description: In Guelph, Ontario, on April 22, 2026, Hammond Power Solutions Inc. (HPS) declared that it is set to unveil its financial results for the First Quarter finishing on March 28, 2026, on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, subsequent to market closure. Post the financial results disclosure, HPS is scheduled to conduct a conference call and webcast on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company trades under the symbol TSX: HPS.A, and this event will provide investors and stakeholders insights into its performance during this period.

data.title: Tasman Therapeutics to Participate in Needham Virtual Psychedelics Forum on April 27, 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in San Francisco, Tasman Therapeutics, a biotechnology firm focused on creating innovative therapies for individuals with challenging mood disorders, revealed that CEO Dan Browne is set to take part in a panel discussion titled "Reimagining Ketamine Delivery for Scale." This event aims to explore new ways to enhance the distribution of ketamine treatments.

data.title: CSX Stock Rallies After Q1 Earnings Report: What To Know
data.description: CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) released its first-quarter results, revealing a mixed performance. The company exceeded earnings per share (EPS) expectations, reporting 43 cents per share, surpassing the estimated 39 cents by 10.26%. However, quarterly revenue fell short at $3.48 billion, missing the projected $3.49 billion. CSX noted a 2% year-over-year revenue increase driven by elevated merchandise pricing and intermodal activity. The stock's movement following the announcement can be monitored. For further details on CSX's Q1 results, visit Benzinga.com.
AMERICAN AIR SAID TO EXPLORE ALASKA AIR REVENUE-SHARING DEAL

data.title: Southwest Airlines Stock Falls On Q1 Results, Guidance: 'Higher Fuel Expense' Weighs On Outlook
data.description: Southwest Airlines Company (NYSE: LUV) fell short of analyst expectations for first-quarter revenue and earnings per share, causing a decline in shares after market close. The company reported first-quarter revenue of $7.25 billion, reflecting a 12.8% increase from the previous year. Although this marked a company record for first-quarter revenue, it was slightly below the Street consensus estimate of $7.27 billion. First-quarter passenger revenue totaled $6.6 billion, a 13.4% increase year-over-year and a new company first-quarter record. Southwest also achieved first-quarter records for passenger, operating, and unit revenues. The first-quarter earnings per share stood at 45 cents, missing analysts' expectations.

data.title: BOYD GROUP SERVICES INC. ANNOUNCES NEW CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER FOR THE U.S. COLLISION BUSINESS AND NEW CHIEF COMMERCIAL OFFICER
data.description: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, on April 22, 2026, Boyd Group Services Inc. announced the appointment of Steve Hoeft as the Chief Operations Officer for the Boyd Group's U.S. collision business. This move comes as part of the company's strategic development plan to enhance operations. Boyd Group's shares are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: BYD) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: BGSI). This appointment signifies a significant step for the company in optimizing its U.S. collision business, demonstrating its commitment to growth and efficiency.

data.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Appoints Dr. Charles Duncan to its Board of Directors
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. appointed Charles Duncan, Ph.D., to its Board of Directors. This addition brings the total number of members on Vanda's Board of Directors to... Vanda Pharmaceuticals' stock is listed on the Nasdaq under the symbol VNDA.

data.title: KIPP Miami to Open Two New Schools at Former Poinciana Park Elementary School Building Starting in August, Expanding High-Quality Educational Options for Families
data.description: In Miami, KIPP Miami revealed plans to be the inaugural charter operator to revive a neglected Miami-Dade County Public Schools site under Florida's School of Hope initiative. The organization will establish two additional schools at the former Poinciana Park Elementary School in Liberty City, starting in August 2026. Moreover, KIPP Miami aims to inaugurate KIPP Miami Technical High School as part of its growth, enabling students to pursue education all the way from kindergarten to career. This move signifies a significant development in the educational landscape, introducing a comprehensive approach to academic and vocational training for the community.

data.title: Canfor releases 2025 Sustainability Report
data.description: Canfor Corporation, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, has disclosed its latest 2025 Sustainability Report. This report, released on April 22, 2026, outlines the company's sustainability approach and highlights its achievements in environmental, social, and governance domains throughout the year 2025. Canfor Corporation's stock is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol CFP.
